title: Pushpa Impossible
desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

title: Itti Si Khushi
desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

title: Maddam Sir
desc: Karishma makes a promise to a lady that she will help her reclaim her job. Later, Karishma is shocked to see that Fatima has been hired for the post.

title: Maddam Sir
desc: On being invited to her new boss's house, Fatima agrees to visit him. Fatima then learns that she will have to visit Karishma's police station to verify her identity card.

title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
desc: Following a traumatic accident and an eight-year memory loss, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.
